original_query: SELECT * FROM (SELECT "DEPTNO" FROM "EMP" WHERE "DEPTNO" < 4) AS "t7" INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM (SELECT "DEPTNO" FROM "EMP" WHERE "DEPTNO" > 7 UNION ALL SELECT "DEPTNO" FROM "EMP") AS "t11" WHERE "DEPTNO" < 4) AS "t12" ON "t7"."DEPTNO" = "t12"."DEPTNO"
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_dept AS (
  SELECT "DEPTNO" 
  FROM "EMP" 
  WHERE "DEPTNO" < 4
)
SELECT t7."DEPTNO", t12."DEPTNO"
FROM filtered_dept AS t7
INNER JOIN filtered_dept AS t12
ON t7."DEPTNO" = t12."DEPTNO"

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Removed the redundant UNION ALL branch in the t12 subquery that cannot satisfy DEPTNO < 4 (DEPTNO > 7 AND DEPTNO < 4 is impossible)
Simplified the t12 subquery by removing the unnecessary nested structure and UNION ALL
